name: 14.5" 21ct LED Light Santa Stop Here Christmas Tree Topper Red - Wondershop™
description:
Make your Christmas extra special and jolly by decorating your Christmas tree with this Red Santa Stop Here 21-LED Light Tree Topper from Wondershop™. This LED light tree topper features a unique design with a star-shaped "Santa Stop Here" sign attached to a candy-colored light pole in festive red and white hues for a merry look, and the brilliant 21-LED top projects multicolored lights to add extra excitement to your seasonal decorations. The classic holiday theme makes it a great pick to top off any Christmas tree, and the lightweight plastic construction is durable enough for use year after year. Simply clip it to your holiday tree to bring some fun, festive cheer.

100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
